title: Pin and record the benchmark environment
description: Fix and capture hardware, runtime, flags, and load so a result is reproducible and comparisons are apples-to-apples.
body: Use when a benchmark result must be trusted or compared across runs. Do not compare numbers gathered on different machines, runtimes, power profiles, or under different background load. Actions: pin CPU frequency/governor where possible, disable turbo/thermal variability, record runtime version, compiler/JIT flags, and machine specs alongside the result, and run baseline and candidate on the same host back-to-back. Validation signals include a recorded environment manifest attached to each result. Risk boundary: an unpinned, unrecorded environment makes a regression indistinguishable from noise; treat results without environment metadata as unverified.
